mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exchange_order (order_no, user_id, item_id, item_name, points_cost, verify_code, status, create_time) VALUES (#{order_no}, #{user_id}, #{item_id}, #{item_name}, #{points_cost}, #{verify_code}, 0, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM exchange_order WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
